message:
fix(codegen): skip PyValue ops for @logic_table methods

@logic_table methods are designed for numeric processing with
anytype parameters. Use runtime.addNum/etc which handle anytype
polymorphism at comptime instead of PyValue runtime dispatch.

This fixes compilation of @logic_table static libraries where
uncertain element types (from anytype array access) were incorrectly
triggering PyValue path, causing type mismatch (PyValue vs f64).
